---
title:  
    "McDonald-Kreitman neutrality test"
date: 
    "May 26th, 2025"
author:  
    "Ali Movasati"  
output:  
    html_document:
        #css: style.css
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 2
        toc_float: true
        number_sections: true
        theme: lumen
        highlight: zenburn
        code_folding: hide
        code_download: true # to make the Rmd source code available
---

```{r}

# loading libraries
library("ggplot2")
library("ggpubr")
library("plotly")
library("ggvenn")
library("hrbrthemes")
library("DT")
library("dplyr")
library("tidyr")
library("Biostrings")
library("stringr")
library("magrittr")
library("rstatix")

```

```{r read-in variant data}


if (file.exists("/home/amovas/")){
  print("Remote HPC Connection!")
  wd <- "/home/amovas/data/genome-evo-proj/"
} else {
  print("Local PC Connection!")
  wd <- "/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/hpc-research/genome-evo-proj/"
}

# load data

source(paste0(wd, "src/analysis/1st-man/readin_data.R"))

```

```{r load visualization settings}
# Visual settings

source(paste0(wd, "src/analysis/1st-man/plot_custom.R"))


```




```{r McDonald-Kreitman test}



df <- data.frame()

for (exp_line in exp_line_factor){
    for (gene in c("gag", "pol","envelope", "nef")){
        variants_expiii_subset <- variants_expiii[variants_expiii$passage == end_psg & variants_expiii$exp_line == exp_line & variants_expiii$feature == gene,]

        P_S <- nrow(variants_expiii_subset[variants_expiii_subset$effect_simplified == "S" & variants_expiii_subset$allele_freq >= 0.01,])
        D_S <- nrow(variants_expiii_subset[variants_expiii_subset$effect_simplified == "S" & variants_expiii_subset$allele_freq >= 0.99,])

        P_N <- nrow(variants_expiii_subset[variants_expiii_subset$effect_simplified == "N" & variants_expiii_subset$allele_freq >= 0.01,])
        D_N <- nrow(variants_expiii_subset[variants_expiii_subset$effect_simplified == "N" & variants_expiii_subset$allele_freq >= 0.99,])
        # Calculate Neutrality Index
        NI <- (P_N / P_S) / (D_N / D_S)
        # Create a contingency table
        MK_table <- matrix(c(D_N, D_S, P_N, P_S), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE,
                        dimnames = list(c("Fixed", "Polymorphic"),
                                        c("Nonsynonymous", "Synonymous")))

        # Perform Fisher's Exact Test
        MK_result <- fisher.test(MK_table)
        MK_result$p.value
        df <- rbind(df, c(exp_line, gene, P_S, D_S, P_N, D_N, NI, MK_result$p.value))

    }
}
```
